calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-01-2004 Continued To Apr-05-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:

This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, CSR: Ron Sinclair, Clerk: Marta Vallejo
Appearances:
David Blumenfeld, Esq. For Plaintiff: Thomas Bernard, present, was sworn & examined.
No appearances by defendants: Joe Ruben and Rose Nicholas , Jury demand is striken.
Exhibits:
1- Rental Agreement
2- Three day notice
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Thomas Bernard and against the defendants: Joe Ruben and Rose Nicholas.
As follows: Forfeiture of the rental agreement, Restitution of the premises located at:
Past-due rent $1,475.00
For the total of $3,244.76
Costs per memo of costs, no attorney fees
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-05-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2004 Continued To Apr-05-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
